name: neokanban
description: NeoKanban by Sponge Theory — manage tasks, projects and boards, and run audio transcription with speaker diarization, directly from Claude Code.

api_url.title: NeoKanban API URL
api_url.description: URL of your NeoKanban instance, without a path — e.g. https://kanban.sponge-theory.dev. Leave the default unless you self-host.

token.title: MCP token (nk_mcp_…)
token.description: Generate this token in the NeoKanban web UI under Settings → Integrations → MCP. Shown once at creation.
